programme.desc: An extraction team embarks on a mission to extract prehistoric creatures' DNA that will bring life-saving benefits to humanity.

programme.title: Xxx: Return Of Xander Cage
programme.desc: When a group of lethal mercenaries steal a weapon that pose a global threat, superspy Xander Cage is recruited to lead a team of adrenaline junkies to save the day.

programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione leave Hogwarts behind on a mission to destroy the Horcruxes, the secrets to Voldemort's power and immortality.

programme.desc: The time has come, the fate foretold in the prophecy draws near: the confrontation to the death between Harry Potter and Lord Voldemort.

programme.title: London Calling
programme.desc: A down on his luck hitman is forced to babysit the teenage son of his new crime boss after fleeing the UK from a job gone wrong.

programme.title: Furious 7
programme.desc: With a revenge-thirsty assassin hot on their heels, Dominic Toretto, Brian O'Conner and the rest of the crew come together as a team to protect their own.

programme.title: Gunner
programme.desc: When special forces veteran Lee Gunner's kids are kidnapped by drug runners he will stop at nothing to get them back.

programme.title: Trust
programme.desc: After a scandal, a Hollywood starlet retreats to a remote cabin – but betrayal by the man she trusted sparks a brutal game of survival.

programme.title: Rob Peace
programme.desc: The true story of Robert Peace who grew up in New Jersey, the son of a convicted murderer, and defied the odds and went to Yale on a full scholarship. But at age 30, his bright future was ended by the bullet of a rival gang dealer.

programme.title: Hustle & Flow
programme.desc: A pimp-cum-drug-dealer suffering from a mid-life crisis forms a band with his pal to reignite his passion for music.

programme.title: King Richard
programme.desc: King Richard follows the journey of Richard Williams, an undeterred father instrumental in raising two of the most extraordinarily gifted athletes of all time, who will end up changing the sport of tennis forever.

programme.title: Urkel Saves Santa: The Movie!
programme.desc: The brilliant but accident-prone Steve Urkel goes to find Santa to help the city rediscover the holiday spirit.

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D finds out that Sunny will have to spend his Saturday relaxing at a teacher's retreat instead of tackling his weekend To-Do List Li'l D proposes that he and the Westley kids do Sunny's chores in exchange for the use of Sunny's state-of-the-art home studio. But when Li'l D throws away Sunny's How To Do the To Do List the kids soon find that getting things done just might do them in.

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.desc: Ever heard the saying 'Never Cry Wolf'? Well don't cry 'Sea Monster' either....

programme.title: The Marvelous Misadventures Of Flapjack S2
programme.desc: Flapjack tries to mingle with children his own age for a change...

programme.title: Top Chef Junior S1
programme.desc: The chefs cool down with an ice cream challenge and duel for legendary Top Chef judges.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: The beloved animated franchise about the remarkable friendship between a young Viking boy named Hiccup and Toothless.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Tintin
programme.desc: Tintin and his friends go on an exciting treasure hunt.

programme.title: Apple & Onion S2
programme.desc: Falafel is starting to feel very underappreciated as the building's handyman. What's the point in all this back breaking work if not a single person will ever tell him, 'Good Job'?

programme.title: Apple & Onion S2
programme.desc: Apple & Onion's jobs have become too demeaning. They decide to put their foots down. It's a matter of pride.

programme.title: Apple & Onion S2
programme.desc: Art is subjective and Apple and Onion agree to let that get between them.

programme.title: Apple & Onion S2
programme.desc: Onion would like to marry the Queen of England.

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1
programme.desc: Adventures with music superstar Sunny Bridges and his class.

programme.title: Class Of 3000 S1
programme.desc: When Li'l D inadvertently offends the participants in the annual Five Points Renaissance Fair the Rennies lay siege to Westley and destroy the school's auditorium. With nowhere to stage their musical production of Rapunzel (in which Eddie will play the lead) the kids ask Eddie to convince his parents to pay for the repairs. However upon hearing about the dangerous way in which the auditorium was destroyed Eddie's parents become unreasonably overprotective of their son to the point where Eddie must decide between quitting the musical or standing up to his parents.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: Chowder gets trapped in a block of ice when his brain freezes.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: When Mung replaces their old snail car with a new one, Chowder can't handle the loss

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: In order to keep receiving the yummy lollistops he gets at the end of each dentist visit, Chowder destroys all of his teeth.

programme.title: Chowder S2
programme.desc: The gang catches Miss Endive doing something repulsive.

programme.title: Chowder S2

programme.title: The Titan Games S2
programme.desc: The competition continues with competitors pushing their bodies to the limit by battling opponents in unforgiving head-to-head challenges, designed by host Dwayne Johnson. In these Eastern division battles we see Michelle Lewis go up against Dasha Kuret and Andrew Hanus take on Ryan Seenberg. They will compete on obstacles such as Launch Pad, Chain Linked, Kick Out and Over the Edge. Winners will move on to face reigning Titan’s on Mt. Olympus, the consummate athletic test of speed, strength, agility and endurance. Cari Champion and Alex Mendez serve as commentators.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries

However, he must lose the tail of Canada’s most notorious fugitive tracker, a trained bear cub named Henri. Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Fired from Baby Corp and trying to build their own business, Boss Baby and Tina waste all their startup funds immediately, requiring a loan from Banker Baby Benny. programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib

programme.desc: The Paladins end up on the set of a game show called "Garfle Warfle Snick," and although they don't know how they got there or how to play the game, they must win in order to escape

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: While Pod 4 cleans the cafeteria after school as punishment for causing a ruckus in class, Liam shares the legend of Crazy Eddy Meyer, a former janitor who went insane and lurks the halls at Cosmos High every Friday the 13th. Skeptical at first, the podmates' bravado begins to erode when they find themselves locked inside the school on a stormy Friday the 13th. The group splits to traverse the spooky terrain of the empty school looking for an exit, as their escalating fear of Crazy Eddy is played out against the background of each of their own secret fears.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Although it looks like a class treasure hunt, it's really all about cooperation. To push this point, Mr. Towes appoints Liam to lead the group. Problem is, everyone has their own idea of how to succeed.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Raffi's admission of vegetarianism has Birch immediately jumping on the flesh-free diet bandwagon. Eventually she gives into temptation sinking her teeth into a burger as Sandra clicks her photo that becomes the winning entry in a burger chain's “Teen of the Month” contest. In an effort to hold Raffi's attention, Birch tries in vain to suppress her hypocrisy and the fast food advertising that expose her meat-eating ways.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: A falling out between Raffi and Liam puts Birch in an awkward position. Fed up with the impact the boys fight is having on her life, she recruits Sandra to help her give them a dose of their own medicine. Meanwhile Sandra is busy doing her own recruiting, looking for volunteers who wouldn't mine “laying down on the job” to help her win the Citywide Skateboard Jumpathon.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose has composed a song for Violet but is upset when the twins break her guitar. How will she sing for Violet now? Could the twins have the answer…

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: All the tots are picking fruit so Poppy can use it to make her famous ice cream. Stingo thinks he has come up with a much better plan to get hold of some ice cream without having to pick anything… will it work?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Grubby has got stuck on Aunt Tulip's boat. Can anybody save him before he floats away?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Stingo's tree house has been invaded by ants. Fifi is determined to get rid of them, as she doesn't want Stingo and Slugsy staying with her a moment longer than necessary!

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose can't make her garden grow and turns to Fifi for advice. She is amazed when Fifi points out that you need to water and weed a garden. And surely she can't really mean putting that yucky compost everywhere can she?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose and Violet are having a sleepover. When Bumble admits that he is scared of the dark, the tots try everything to stop him from being afraid

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Fifi and Bumble deliver lots of delicious honey to Poppy's stall. They lose a pot on the way and there isn't enough to go round. Can they find the missing pot, or will Stingo have to go without his honey for tea?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Poppy is having a line dancing party, but none of the other flowertots know how to do it. Will any of them learn to dance in time or will Poppy have to cancel the party?

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: On a school trip to the aquarium, Olivia and her classmates compete to be the first to view all the exhibits and win a chance to help feed the sea-lions. Olivia is partnered with Francine, and the two girls have to reconcile their different approaches in order to win the prize.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: It's Olivia's parents' anniversary, and they're planning a night out at a special restaurant. When they can't find a babysitter, Grandma happily volunteers. When Olivia suggests they all surprise Mum and Dad at dinner, she discovers the restaurant isn't at all the way she imagined, but it's a lot more fun!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: Poppy faces her first royal review as Queen and sets out to ensure 100 happiness in Troll VillagePoppy must figure out how to handle crime in Troll Village when Cooper steals a pie.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: Poppy signs the Trolls up for a game of Bergenball with the toughest Bergen team aroundSmidge and Guy Diamond face off in a competition for juice dominance.

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: The Big Brain Boov recruit Oh to join them; Oh is introduced to the concept of "harmless lying," and lies so much that he is unable to distinguish between fact and fiction

programme.title: Home: Adventures With Tip And Oh!
programme.desc: Tip becomes a Boovsland rock icon due to her awful guitar playing; When Donny takes Oh fishing, they battle a giant Sturgeon

programme.title: Dinotrux Supercharged
programme.desc: When Ty gets tangled in a shockarachnid web Revvit ClickClack and a superstitious Otto must go on a highstakes adventure in the ruins of an ancient ravine to find a legendary diamond bit

programme.title: Dinotrux Supercharged
programme.desc: When Garby eats a dozen superchargers sending all of his systems into high gear Revvit must save him before everything gets destroyed and Garby must learn to use his new abilities to battle unexpected Scrapadactyls

programme.title: Fresh off the Sea
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, Dex and special guests are visiting seaside villages in Korea. They will live there and cook fresh seasonal dishes using ingredients from the sea.

programme.title: Cha's Family

programme.desc: Park Bo-gum, who holds a national barber’s license, and his close friends Lee Sang-yi and Kwak Dong-yeon run a special barbershop in a remote rural village, tending to both hair and hearts.

programme.desc: <Dear X> follows Baek Ah-jin, a top actress who leverages her beauty and popularity to further her career through manipulation. She harbors a lot of grudges behind her somewhat good-natured demeanor.

programme.desc: The cast travels across South Korea, discovering unique culture, nature, magical places, and fascinating people. Each episode features different guests, joining in the joyful journey.

programme.title: Go-Go Sisters
programme.desc: Go-go sisters brings together two parallel stories about young ambitious teenage girls and middle-aged women who have experienced life's sweet spiciness.

programme.title: The Hunter'S Prayer
programme.desc: An assassin is sent to kill a young woman but finds himself unable to pull the trigger. They form an uneasy alliance and flee from their pursuers.

programme.title: Sinkhole
programme.desc: A man and his family has just recently moved into a house when a sinkhole suddenly engulfs the whole apartment. As rain begins to fill the sinkhole with water, the survivors must find a solution before time runs out.

programme.title: Armour Of God 2
programme.desc: A treasure hunter is hired to help the UN find Nazi gold hidden in Sahara

programme.title: Trouble
programme.desc: A pampered dog named Trouble must learn to live in the real world while trying to escape from his former owner's greedy children and must learn how to survive on the big-city streets.

programme.title: Hitman: Agent Jun
programme.desc: An unsuccessful comic book artist runs into trouble after publishing a story containing real secrets from his former life as a NIS hitman

programme.title: Escape Room
programme.desc: Six friends test their intelligence when an escape room they participate in takes a dark and twisted turn.

programme.title: Prison On Fire 2
programme.desc: A convict befriends a fellow inmate and escapes from jail to visit his son in an orphanage.

programme.title: King Of Beggars
programme.desc: A rich family's son falls in love with a woman who will only marry him once he becomes a Kung-Fu Master. In this 'Dramedy' He becomes a legendary hero, by attempting to save the emperor, during his true quest of love.

programme.title: London Has Fallen
programme.desc: In London for the Prime Minister's funeral, Mike Banning is caught up in a plot to assassinate all the attending world leaders.

programme.title: Death Forest And Death Forest 2
programme.desc: The students of a school go on a trip not knowing what's in there can I survive The mysterious ghost of the forest and just like that it's a bloody massacre.

programme.title: The Dude In Me
programme.desc: After an accident sends a bullied high school student crashing into a feared mob boss, they wake up to find they've mysteriously swapped bodies.

programme.title: The Row
programme.desc: A college freshman discovers a dark secret about the sorority house she's pledging for after a series of murders terrorize the campus.

programme.title: Sting: Ever Evolving
programme.desc: Sting: Ever Evolving is an enthralling documentary that delves into the multifaceted life of one of music's most iconic figures. The documentary offers an unprecedented glimpse into the mind of a musical legend, showcasing how his art continues to inspire and challenge the world.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Meet the new wild warrior volunteers, as they are introduced to Imire’s extended animal family. Getting dirty is part of the job. And of course, there are always striking surprises at any moment.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, we witness a desperate mission to save a spooked impala. The intelligence of these anti poaching elephants astounds everyone. And, there is always time for fun tasks.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episoden the volunteers experience close up encounters with iconic creatures. Immersion into Imire’s anti-poaching efforts. And, nothing stands in the way of hard work.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: Volunteers explore the community’s role in conservation, with thrilling honey harvesting, a new addition to the team, and a dream come true as one feeds a black rhino.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this engaging episode, Reilly shares his rhino release dream. It’s time for Judy’s beloved duiker to return to the wild. And, a routine nyala capture takes an unexpected turn.

programme.title: Wild Warrior Encounters
programme.desc: In this episode, a warthog retrieval mission goes awry. Meet the matriarch of Imire, a wonderful elephant that has a unique story. It’s time to say farewell to the Imire family.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Most Luxurious Train Journeys: Scotland
programme.desc: Alan enjoys the train's spa, visits Wemyss Bay, tours Mount Stuart on Bute, sees a rare Shakespeare folio, explores crew areas, joins wild adventures, and tours Pitlochry’s famed hilltop theatre.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Most Luxurious Train Journeys: Scotland
programme.desc: Alan’s luxury train tour continues with cabin views, Culloden’s history, seal-spotting in Plockton, cattle droving tales, train driving, whisky tasting, eagle spotting, and countryside yoga bliss.

programme.title: Alan Cumming's Most Luxurious Train Journeys: Scotland
programme.desc: Alan’s rare journey sails to Iona and Staffa, tours Scone Palace and V&A Dundee, reunites with a Broadway friend, savours Oban seafood, and ends with a ceilidh and farewell over the Forth Bridge.

programme.title: How Did They Fix That? S2
programme.desc: In Philadelphia, Mike Davidson is on streets, in tunnels, on tracks and in trolley restoration garages - working shoulder-to-shoulder with the team that keeps one of America's largest and oldest mass transit systems running smoothly and on time.

programme.title: Mega Transports Specials
programme.desc: A unique mega transport made of steel and titanium with a special purpose: to extract tons of gold. This so-called autoclave is the biggest of its kind.

programme.title: Mega Transports Specials
programme.desc: This giant magnet will revolutionize the world and energy production in the future. The world's largest nuclear fusion reactor is currently under construction in southern France.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam goes in search of the best seafood that Singapore has to offer. His journey begins inside the Marina Bay Sands resort complex where many celebrity chefs have opened eateries.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In his quest to find the best ingredients for his banquet dinner, Adam Liaw visits a colourful fruit and veg market in Geylang and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In between some cocktail-tasting pit stops, Adam Liaw discovers some of the finest desserts in Singapore, from homemade Peranakan sweet treats to a sophisticated dessert bar.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw gathers what he has learned over the past few weeks to serve up an impressive five-course banquet dinner to some distinguished guests, including his mother.

programme.title: A New Zealand Food Story S3
programme.desc: Ben’s food story journey starts in the deep south where he learns why lamb tastes so good. He meets the earliest pioneers producing truffles and travels by helicopter into Fiordland in search of Wapiti.

programme.title: A New Zealand Food Story S3
programme.desc: Ben travels to Northland and learns about wine in the region. He discovers a peanut farm, meets tropical papaya fruit growers and catches up with a team of scientists cultivating kingfish like never before.

programme.title: A New Zealand Food Story S3
programme.desc: It’s asparagus season – Ben picks the 3 varieties. He meets a farmer and understands the benefits of grass-fed beef. Ben catches up with the ‘Soil Sisters’ a movement focussed on growing your own fruit and vegetables.

programme.title: A New Zealand Food Story S3
programme.desc: Ben checks out a sustainably farmed Green Shell Mussel Farm and visits a peanut butter factory. He travels to Canterbury to meet an ostrich farmer and cooks ostrich for the first time ever!

programme.title: A New Zealand Food Story S3
programme.desc: Ben meets a Gin maker, an Italian chacutier and celebrates a wine maker committed to the principles of sustainable farming. Ben milks sheep and learns how next generation farmers are diversifying their business.

programme.title: Matthew Perry: Not Just Friends
programme.desc: Matthew Perry, beloved for his role as Chandler Bing, is remembered through archive footage highlighting his comedic legacy and personal struggles, both on and off set, as a cherished friend and human being.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Laugh Until You Cry
programme.desc: The comic genius with an electric mind, with a range of talent that left us breathless. His story inspires us to look past the mask of those people who seem to have a perfect life. His legacy lives on.

programme.title: John Cena: Champion Of The Ring
programme.desc: John Cena dominated wrestling for over a decade before transitioning to Hollywood, following Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. Whether acting or wrestling, he lives by his mantra: Hustle, Loyalty, and Respect.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Dinotrux Supercharged
programme.desc: SkrapIt steals the Truxs new supply of superchargers but accidentally spills them in Scraptor Valley causing the crater to be overrun with SUPER SCRAPTORS

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Pixie loves to ride the clouds, but she can't understand why Kelp doesn’t love it, too. If they don't agree on this, does that mean they're not best friends anymore? / Kelp helps Ollie fulfill his dream of watching the white whale migration.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When shark and pilot fish are separated it’s up to Kelp, Scallop, Cruz, and Waverly to help them find each other again. / Scallop’s friend Theo finally comes clean on why he’s always rushing off.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail. Tag helps train him (and his tail), and they even track down Master Wag who gives Scooch a good luck charm. But when Scooch loses the good luck charm before his tail-kwondo test, he needs to find a way to believe in himself.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Donna's delivery truck breaks down, it's up to the crew to help Donna continue delivering packages to Harmony Harbor's residents. / When the crew takes on a mission to rescue a lost pet, Ellie must face her fears in order to help save the day.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When Harper’s ceramic dragon is smashed, the Dews must find all the pieces. But when a piece ends up missing, the Dews work together to create a new piece, hoping no one will notice. / Dylan goes to great lengths to invite his Dew Drop to his soccer game but, in the process, learns that sometimes believing in something is more powerful than seeing something.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When teamed up with her new friend Lerk, Eep's competitive side takes over when she sets out to win the first-ever school hunting exam at any cost.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Eep and Thunk challenge each other in the first-ever dare-off, Thunk faces the deep end - his greatest fear; Grug picks a fight with the moon.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss scours Chicago to find his old co-worker nemesis Board Member Bradley, his key to cutting a deal with the Federal Agents for his freedom. However, he must lose the tail of Canada’s most notorious fugitive tracker, a trained bear cub named Henri. Meanwhile, Tina is trapped at home with her paranoid grandma Yaya, forced to prove to her that she’s not a criminal baby like the news is causing Yaya to believe.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: The Templeton’s hometown is overtaken by baby criminals, with Temp Baby Aubrey in charge. Boss has 48 hours to somehow restore them all to adulthood and turn them in, or face jail time himself. With Tina now acting like a dark angel of vengeance after feeling betrayed by Aubrey, Boss is forced to assemble a team from unlikely odd friends. Together, they launch a final mission to settle old scores and clear Boss Baby’s name.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Hiccup and Stoick set forth to find willow bark while Gobber holds a cookoff for the merchants until things go a riot and the riders have to protect Berk

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge
programme.desc: Krogen is on the hunt for dragon lenses and Snotlout and Minden do their best to defend Wing Island. Back in Berk Dagur and Mala feud over keeping the lenses safe

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby, Pandy, and Carlita prepare for the annual Meow-Mazing Games, they encounter stiff competition from the Doodads and must work together to bring home the coveted dollhouse trophy.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Pandy’s birthday!! The dollhouse is throwing a surprise party for him! Gabby goes room to room preparing all his favorite things for the party, but when the big moment comes, Pandy drops his cake! Gabby consoles him and tells him it’s even better – now, they have smash cake! They all hold up a piece and pose for a picture.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss Baby and Tina reject the 5%er system that says the cuter you are, the more love you deserve. Teaming up with the Uncuddleables, the team tries to take down the system from within, forming a resistance of the eight department heads of Baby Corp in the hopes of changing the way we look at Baby Love forever.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Fired from Baby Corp and trying to build their own business, Boss Baby and Tina waste all their startup funds immediately, requiring a loan from Banker Baby Benny. In order to receive their seed money and get their company rolling, they have to rebuild the town’s faith in a baby who made everyone miss a huge sporting even (and they have to do it on a very limited budget)

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Unable to land baby clients, Boss and Tina take in a naughty little puppy as a side hustle, trying to earn a little extra scrap. But once they discover the dogs in the neighborhood are stealing for a puppy trainer named Becker, the mission gets much bigger, and our team is forced to earn a little Puppy Love for once.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Now in Rafaela’s custody, the crew works together to break Echo out to retrieve the hauler. Echo makes it into the jungle and must battle a mind-controlled Ms. Nowhere using everything she’s learned about spying and survival from the very woman who's out to get her. Meanwhile, Rafaela enlists Frostee to help her develop a non-exploding version of the mind control formula before her plan goes into motion at the favela race.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Echo and Ms. Nowhere bust Cisco, Frostee, and Gary out of their cell. But Rafaela has already mind controlled Tony and Layla and taken them to drive for her in the favela race, allowing her to release her mind control formula on the crowd!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Our team battles Rafaela’s mind-controlled crowd. They soon discover that Rafaela’s true plan is to steal the spy plane. Tony deduces that Rafaela isn’t doing all of this for the money - she’s doing it for family.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: There is more epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates, one of which is out for revenge against Mr. Ping! The adventures lead them to London, where they are wanted by the Knights. Old enemies resurface and Blade will have to face one of her most challenging opponents—her mom. And somehow, Po finds himself in a chess tournament against the Queen of England!

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: When Ugga's new surprise attack fails, and she comes home in a bad mood, Thunk tries to cure it by finding a happy surprise for his mom/ Eep stays up all night to see the mysterious and rare Night Mare (a horse with a rainbow mane) when she's teased for thinking they're not real.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods
programme.desc: Eep joins the Scream-Leading team and starts picking up characteristics of her coach, Meep, much to Ugga's chagrin/Meep kicks Snoot out of the cave for not being a brave hunter. The Croods reluctantly take Snoot in and try to make him into a hunter to get him out of their home.

programme.desc: The Paladins end up on the set of a game show called "Garfle Warfle Snick," and although they don't know how they got there or how to play the game, they must win in order to escape

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: While Pod 4 cleans the cafeteria after school as punishment for causing a ruckus in class, Liam shares the legend of Crazy Eddy Meyer, a former janitor who went insane and lurks the halls at Cosmos High every Friday the 13th. Skeptical at first, the podmates' bravado begins to erode when they find themselves locked inside the school on a stormy Friday the 13th. The group splits to traverse the spooky terrain of the empty school looking for an exit, as their escalating fear of Crazy Eddy is played out against the background of each of their own secret fears.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Although it looks like a class treasure hunt, it's really all about cooperation. To push this point, Mr. Towes appoints Liam to lead the group. Problem is, everyone has their own idea of how to succeed.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: Raffi's admission of vegetarianism has Birch immediately jumping on the flesh-free diet bandwagon. Eventually she gives into temptation sinking her teeth into a burger as Sandra clicks her photo that becomes the winning entry in a burger chain's “Teen of the Month” contest. In an effort to hold Raffi's attention, Birch tries in vain to suppress her hypocrisy and the fast food advertising that expose her meat-eating ways.

programme.title: My Life Me
programme.desc: A falling out between Raffi and Liam puts Birch in an awkward position. Fed up with the impact the boys fight is having on her life, she recruits Sandra to help her give them a dose of their own medicine. Meanwhile Sandra is busy doing her own recruiting, looking for volunteers who wouldn't mine “laying down on the job” to help her win the Citywide Skateboard Jumpathon.

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose has composed a song for Violet but is upset when the twins break her guitar. How will she sing for Violet now? Could the twins have the answer…

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: All the tots are picking fruit so Poppy can use it to make her famous ice cream. Stingo thinks he has come up with a much better plan to get hold of some ice cream without having to pick anything… will it work?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Grubby has got stuck on Aunt Tulip's boat. Can anybody save him before he floats away?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Stingo's tree house has been invaded by ants. Fifi is determined to get rid of them, as she doesn't want Stingo and Slugsy staying with her a moment longer than necessary!

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose can't make her garden grow and turns to Fifi for advice. She is amazed when Fifi points out that you need to water and weed a garden. And surely she can't really mean putting that yucky compost everywhere can she?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Primrose and Violet are having a sleepover. When Bumble admits that he is scared of the dark, the tots try everything to stop him from being afraid

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Fifi and Bumble deliver lots of delicious honey to Poppy's stall. They lose a pot on the way and there isn't enough to go round. Can they find the missing pot, or will Stingo have to go without his honey for tea?

programme.title: Fifi and the Flowertots
programme.desc: Poppy is having a line dancing party, but none of the other flowertots know how to do it. Will any of them learn to dance in time or will Poppy have to cancel the party?

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: On a school trip to the aquarium, Olivia and her classmates compete to be the first to view all the exhibits and win a chance to help feed the sea-lions. Olivia is partnered with Francine, and the two girls have to reconcile their different approaches in order to win the prize.

programme.title: Olivia
programme.desc: It's Olivia's parents' anniversary, and they're planning a night out at a special restaurant. When they can't find a babysitter, Grandma happily volunteers. When Olivia suggests they all surprise Mum and Dad at dinner, she discovers the restaurant isn't at all the way she imagined, but it's a lot more fun!

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: When a swashbuckling adventurer named Waldondo comes to town, the Riders enthusiastically join him on a treasure hunt for a priceless gem.

programme.title: Trolls: The Beat Goes On!
programme.desc: Poppy faces her first royal review as Queen and sets out to ensure 100 happiness in Troll VillagePoppy must figure out how to handle crime in Troll Village when Cooper steals a pie.

programme.title: China Showbiz
programme.desc: The China Showbiz gathers together a wide range of wonderful TV artistic works and directs viewers into a fabulous world of arts through works appreciation and review.

programme.title: China News
programme.desc: It concentrates on the latest news and social changes happening in china and all over the world

programme.title: On the Way
programme.desc: a large-scale tourism programme that is designed to present rich tourism resources in China and around the world

programme.title: Nostalgia
programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. In this show, the audience can enjoy the natural and cultural backgrounds of Chinese traditional villages, and will find their knowledge of this oriental country expand through the interviews of Chinese people overseas whose memory and nostalgia can also reveal the very core value of the Chinese traditional culture.

programme.title: Across the Strait
programme.desc: The Across the Strait traces the much-discussed issues across the Strait, reflects the will of the citizens on two sides of the Strait and details the Chinese Government’s policy of “one country, two systems” in a bid to enhance the Taiwan fellowmen’s understanding of the Mainland China.

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Indonesian famous models Patricia and Chika as they explore the city's hidden gems and vibrant scenes, immersing themselves in amazing contrasts and trendy vibes.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Underground boxer Lin Feng is hunted by the Bangkok triad when he refuses to fight in an illegal match. He escaped successfully but lost his memory. While Feng begins a new life, the triad finds him and hires a top boxer to beat him. As Feng suddenly regains his memory in the process, he vows to take down the triad.

programme.title: Blood Hunters: Rise of the Hybri
programme.desc: Gabriella is driven by vengeance after a hybrid monster slaughters her family. On her quest, she joins a squad of Blood Hunters and together they wage war against ruthless underworld warlords, igniting a brutal showdown.

programme.title: VR Fighter
programme.desc: Bodyguard Long Wei has post‐traumatic stress disorder after his wife's death. One day, he encounters Amy who works for a VR technology firm and is invited for a new product test. After the test, Long Wei becomes the firm’s VR fighter and dons the newly invented armour. However, as mysterious armed men break in, a fierce battle has just begun...

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: The Monkey is Back
programme.desc: The savior of the people, Stone Monkey, has given hope to a desperate little girl which he promises to realize. Years later, Stone Monkey is defeated in a battle with the three-eyed God of War, causing him to lose his power and falls into the mortal world. Can he fulfill his promise to the girl and stop the God of Wood from destroying earth?

programme.title: The Foggy Mountain
programme.desc: Phi, a veteran boxer, sets out on a quest for revenge after the ruthless crime lord Ba Rau killed his wife. His journey takes him into the remote village near Foggy Mountain, where he discovers Ba Rau's human trafficking activities. The final showdown is inevitable as Phi must take down Ba Rau to save the villagers and avenge his wife’s death.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don’t care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.title: Legends Of The Fork
programme.desc: Seafood may not be your first thought when you think of a city like Detroit, Michigan, but at the Belgian-inspired Cadieux Cafe, Buddy tries the best bowl of steamed mussels and braised Belgian rabbit.

programme.title: Murder Below Deck
programme.desc: When Lauren gives up the corporate life and a cheating boyfriend, she joins her best friend working aboard a yacht in the South Pacific. As her first voyage sets sail, she falls for entrepreneur Mark.

programme.title: Murdaugh Murders: The Movie - Part 2
programme.desc: This twisted saga, one that has entranced and disturbed the public for years, continues to captivate with its true tale of privilege, madness, and murder.

programme.title: MasterChef USA (S13)
programme.desc: Season 13 celebrates the “United Tastes of America,” bringing together chefs from four regions of the country: the Northeast, the Midwest, the West and the South.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Always game to try new things, Theresa and Kiana attend a line-dancing class in Dallas. While there, Theresa conducts an impromptu group reading that leaves several cowboys in tears.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1)
programme.desc: Junho, who had chosen a ₩7,500-per-night room during their last Vietnam trip, is back as the lodging dokbakja for their Thailand adventure. With both excitement and anxiety, the Dokbakz follow Junho.

programme.desc: It’s the first cook of Sweet Week, and contestants must take their cue from a very gooey mystery box lift, and incorporate an element of ‘goo’ into a dessert.

programme.desc: Rachael prepares a traditional pollo al mattone, an Italian roast chicken, by seasoning spatchcock chickens, cooking them in a pan with a brick wrapped in tin foil, and serving them with sautéed greens.

programme.title: Hari ng Selda (Anak ni Baby Ama 2)
programme.desc: Anghel is a convict feared and respected by the other inmates, the "Hari Ng Selda", in a prison operated by a cruel and abusive superintendent. He meets Angelica, a student on a school trip who is immediately drawn to him.

programme.title: Double Barrel
programme.desc: A young impoverished couple work as hired killers.

programme.title: Just A Stranger
programme.desc: A story of a woman and a man, half of her age being in love with each other despite the fact that they are both tied with someone else.

programme.title: Won't Last A Day Without You
programme.desc: DJ Heidee (Sarah Geronimo) provides love advice to people who are having problems in their relationships. In the process of getting Melissa and Andrew together, Heidee begin to feel an attraction toward Andrew.

programme.title: Laruang Buhay
programme.desc: Paulo (Raul Zaragoza) is a policeman with a special mission: to find his missing brother. In search for the sibling who rebelled against him, Paulo finds himself in a far-flung town where the mayor is king and the people are timid subjects.

programme.title: The Exorsis
programme.desc: The film follows Gina, who must find an exorcist after her younger sister gets possessed by a dead woman's spirit.

programme.title: Elevator
programme.desc: Trapped inside the elevator of a hotel casino complex, an elevator boy falls in love with his investor's girlfriend that forces him to choose between his love for her, or his dreams for a better future.

programme.title: A Glimpse of Forever
programme.desc: Glenda (Jasmine Curtis-Smith) pursues comfort in virtual dating to make up for the lack of romance from her real-life partner. But what was meant to be make-believe may turn out to be a genuine connection.

programme.title: Kiss Mo Ko
programme.desc: Clarisse is neglected by her boyfriend, James. Together with her friends Dindi and Cynthia, they create an imaginary suitor complete with a name- Aaron Nakpil.

programme.title: Room Service
programme.desc: Two lovers thirsty for sex, clash in one story to build an intense passion for love and aspiration.

programme.title: Paloma
programme.desc: In an environment ruled by mores and conventions, is there a room where unorthodox love can bloom?

programme.title: Maid in London
programme.desc: Inspired by true events, a young mother, Margo (Andi Eigenmann) and her best friend, Faye (Alexis Navarro) are forced to cling to the edge of a knife so they could travel in the United Kingdom.

programme.title: No Other Woman
programme.desc: The film revolves on a man's journey on becoming a successful working husband whose perfect marriage becomes complicated when he commits into an adulterous affair that changes his life.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible S1 E19 - The Diamond
programme.desc: After a tiny tape recorder explains the seemingly unachievable mission and self-destructs, the team goes into action, weaving elaborate schemes and wearing incredible disguises to foil the globe's worst criminals.

programme.title: Xena: Warrior Princess S1 E16 - Mortal Beloved
programme.desc: Xena, one of the fiercest, sexiest, most self-empowered women as she travels defending the innocent from the forces of darkness. She is the very definition of girl power.

programme.title: The Waltons S3 E03 - The First Day
programme.desc: Eldest son, John-Boy Walton, makes the family proud as he starts his first year in college, pursuing his dream of becoming a writer--a course that is both challenging and rewarding for John-Boy and the entire Walton family.Younger siblings Jason and Mary Ellen Walton discover the professions to which they will devote their lives in this heartwarming drama about growing up in the loving embrace of a large Appalachia family.

programme.title: The Jeffersons S5 E18 - The Other Woman
programme.desc: With his dry-cleaning business booming, George Jefferson moves his family--level-headed wife Louise and son Lionel to the upper east side. But life in a luxurious Manhattan high-rise holds unexpected pitfalls for George.

programme.title: Frasier S3 E19 - Crane vs. Crane
programme.desc: In the third season of FRASIER additions to the recurring cast include Marta, Maris' maid and go-between, Frasier's son, Frederick, and Kate Costas, the headstrong, ratings-obsessed new manager of Frasier's home radio station KACL.

programme.title: The New Adventures of Wonder Woman E06 - The Pied Piper
programme.desc: With the strength of Hercules, the wisdom of Athena, the speed of Mercury and the beauty of Aphrodite, she's Wonder Woman.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot S5 E02 - The Underdog
programme.desc: David Suchet portrays the inspired Belgian investigator, Hercule Poirot; creating a unique catalogue of timeless crime fiction.

programme.desc: An astronaut's life is thrown into chaos when he discovers a bottle that contains a beautiful female genie.

programme.desc: The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified With David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: While wars may be won by men, they're fought with weapons. Teetering between the apocalyptic and absurd, declassified records will unveil the secret weapons programs that attempted to bring down the world.

programme.title: Holy Marvels With Dennis Quaid (S1)
programme.desc: Most of the world's holiest places sit in plain sight. But there are some hidden. The revered tomb of Jesus Christ and a prehistoric temple in Malta with mystical properties—why were they concealed?

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S2)
programme.desc: Explore the forgotten kingdom of the White Rajahs of Sarawak, and uncover the disappearing headhunting tribe known as the Ibans.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: The team seeks out the wreck of the Revonoc, a racing yacht that vanished in 1958 with a crew of five. A freak magnetic anomaly was detected in the Triangle when she went missing.

programme.title: The Secret Of Skinwalker Ranch (S4)
programme.desc: When a former ranch investigator and government official returns to help the team with a new experiment, it leads to a shocking revelation.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: As gator season comes down to the wire, Ashley and Anna try to evade poachers. Troy calls upon his decades of swamp wisdom to reclaim the lead in the competition.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's the unsolved air piracy case in history. A man hijacks a Northwest Orient Airlines flight, demanding 4 parachutes and $200,000. He jumps off the plane with the money and is never seen again.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S4)
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous stories from the Bible: God sends a flood to wipe out nearly every living thing on Earth, except for Noah, his family, and the animals he saves in his fabled ark.

programme.title: How Disney Built America
programme.desc: Walt Disney overcomes immense obstacles to create the first theme park, where instead of thrill rides, he gives the visitor an immersive journey into a story, like the experience of being inside a movie.

programme.title: Forged In Fire (S10)
programme.desc: We dig deep inside and revisit some of our favourite competitions over the years. From gladiators and Greeks to horror and holidays, join us as we look back at some of Forged in Fire's best episodes.

programme.title: Alone (S10)
programme.desc: As the remaining survivalists near day 50, conditions at Reindeer Lake intensify. Desperation rises as the temperatures continue to drop, and personal demons bubble to the surface.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S12)
programme.desc: On his 80th birthday Tom builds a teepee, while Nancy plans him a surprise party. Jake runs a mountain lion off the highway during calving season. Paul hauls his trapping shed up a narrow mountain.

programme.desc: From the destructive Viking axe, to the sacred but deadly Samurai katana, razor sharp blades wielded by fearsome warriors have spilt blood and forged empires.

programme.desc: A librarian's husband turn out to be psychotically abusive. When the husband mistakenly thinks he has killed her, he dumps her in a river. In need of help to take revenge, she hooks up with a bank robber and together they kill him.

programme.title: Ang Mamatay Nang Dahil Sa Iyo
programme.desc: Anthony Alonzo characterizes a patriotic soldier whose amor patria runs curdling in his veins. His ideologies led him to a clash of opinions with his younger brother.

programme.title: Eseng Ng Tondo (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: FPJ played Eseng 45, a Manila policeman known for his proficiency with the 45 caliber gun. He was also known to be an honest and dedicated cop, the nemesis of evil in the crime-ridden area of Tondo.

programme.title: I Love You Sabado
programme.desc: Heaven makes mistakes too. Janno was killed before his time and must be sent back to earth. However, the Chief Angel found out that he was due to die in one week's time, or next Saturday or Sabado and he would go to hell.

programme.title: Dodong Armado
programme.desc: Raymart played Dodong, a young man who was trying to escape the memory of a tragic childhood which claimed the lives of his parents.

programme.title: Epifano Ang Bilas Ko
programme.desc: This merry romp spoofs the highly successful "Epimaco Velasco Story" but instead of a heroic NBI detective with a bumbling private eye in the lead, Epifanio and his brother-in-law heads a detective and security agency.

programme.title: Onyok Velasco Story
programme.desc: Born to a family of boxers, Onyok Velasco ate and breathed boxing. The whole nation watched his fight, hoping and praying for Onyok to win the gold. Robbed of the gold or not, Onyok, without doubt, came home victorious.

programme.title: Kadenang Bulaklak
programme.desc: Three little girls were given up for adoption after their parents were killed in an accident. Vina, the oldest sister, was left behind with an aunt. She vowed that one day, she would find all her sisters and reunite her family.

programme.title: Bakit Bughaw Ang Langit?
programme.desc: Why is the sky blue? Why do we love the people we love? These are questions no one can answer. Because is just is.

programme.title: Kolehiyala
programme.desc: Three girls in their first year of college face varied but equally difficult problems. They lead their lives very different from the country's perception of the "kolehiyala" as a young, innocent girl.

programme.title: Itanong Mo Sa Buwan
programme.desc: Josie is not really a victim but Angelito's lover. He then declares they planned the whole thing to finance a new life together. Who is telling the truth?

programme.title: Tondo, Libingan Ng Mga Siga
programme.desc: Tondo, where gangs proliferate and crime is a way of life. This is the home of Willie Cuevas, who made his living doing the dirty work for a corrupt law enforcer.

programme.desc: The popular radio and TV show for lonely hearts hosted by DJ Joe D'Mango came to the big screen with two stories of young love based on letters from listeners.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 9
programme.desc: Let freedom ring, as World's Dumbest presents "Only in America." Featuring 20 of the most patriotic patriots in the land - from a cop's strange take on the national anthem, to a dangerous mishap with a bald eagle, and the most insane thank you to thetroops ever put on film. Plus awesome commentary from our cast of America's best comics, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey and Jaime Andrews.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S6 17
programme.desc: After a terrible date, Raj vows to never leave his apartment again. Meanwhile, Penny actually impresses Sheldon with her acting skills.

programme.title: Container Wars S2 5
programme.desc: Jason's got the inside track on a container that could have him coasting to paradise, but will some rotten contents spoil his score?

programme.title: Shazam!
programme.desc: We all have a superhero inside us, it just takes a bit of magic to bring it out. In Billy Batson’s (Asher Angel) case, by shouting out one word—SHAZAM!—this streetwise 14-year-old foster kid can turn into the adult Super Hero Shazam (Zachary Levi), courtesy of an ancient wizard (Djimon Hounsou). Still a kid at heart—inside a ripped, godlike body—Shazam revels in this adult version of himself by doing what any teen would do with superpowers: have fun with them! Can he fly? Does he have X-ray vision? Can he shoot lightning out of his hands? Can he skip his social studies test? Shazam sets out to test the limits of his abilities with the joyful recklessness of a child. But he’ll need to master these powers quickly in order to fight the deadly forces of evil controlled by Dr. Thaddeus Sivana (Mark Strong).

When a woman he likes seems to be bullied by her son, he goes about setting things right for her, even resorting to turning himself into a cold-blooded serial killer…

programme.title: Chop Chop
programme.desc: A young couple's tranquility is shattered by a psychotic serial killer one quiet evening. Their battle for survival reveals hidden truths, entangling them unwittingly with the criminal underworld.

programme.title: The Occupant
programme.desc: Following the death of their mother, four estranged siblings find themselves fighting for their inheritance and their lives when an eccentric stranger arrives, claiming their haunted childhood home was left to her. They start to experience strange, inexplicable manifestations, which have malevolent effects on everyone in the house.

programme.title: IBLIS
programme.desc: A husband buys a new house for his wife, hoping to reconcile their marriage. When they move in however, the couple starts to experience some terrifying incidents, including the presence of a horrifying creature in the house…

programme.title: Ten Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Amy gets bitten by a rabid bat during her last graveyard shift as a veteran punk rock disc jockey. When a storm traps Amy, her mysterious replacement and an anxious staff inside their small-town radio station, reality starts to distort as they go deeper into the graveyard shift…

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn
programme.desc: A pair of fraternal twins spend a terrifying night in a remote inn to investigate the last known whereabouts of their father who mysteriously disappeared the night they were born. As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: Central Park
programme.desc: A group of teenagers hang out for a night of fun in Central Park, but encounters a revenge-seeking killer who plans to kill them off one by one to pay for the sins of one of their fathers.

programme.title: Beneath the Surface
programme.desc: Lexy's life becomes a living nightmare after surviving a huge white shark attack in which her father and sister died. However, with the help of a psychiatrist, she delves deeper into the haunting flashbacks and gradually uncovers the truth of what happened that fateful night.

programme.title: Impermanence
programme.desc: A series of strange events is happening in a peaceful village, including a corpse that is resurrected from its grave and ran away. As the villagers investigate, a villain dies and the village head also goes missing. Police investigation ensues, but as the truths start to unveil, more mysteries are unfolding. Who is the one behind them all?

programme.title: 3AM
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Night at the Eagle Inn

As they dive deeper, the property's dark secrets ensnare them in a hellish labyrinth which they must escape before dawn.

programme.title: Zombie Island
programme.desc: Jeff, a big fan of zombies, goes to a deserted and mysterious island with his friends hoping to seek out exciting adventures. What started as an adventure turns out to be a horrifying journey as they get trapped on the island and are attacked by the zombies! Their lives are in danger when they fail to fight back, and the game has only just begun!

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: When a young mother, Selonia Reed, 26, is found brutally murdered in her car, detectives turn over every rock in small-town Hammond, Louisiana, in search of her killer.

programme.title: Murder At The Motel
programme.desc: May 13, 2020, Reno, Nevada. Officers from the Reno Police Department are dispatched to the La Quinta Inn after several motel guests report hearing gunshots in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A suspect is interrogated about a shocking and elaborate hoax; an NFL Hall of Famer breaks the law and pays the price; a murder suspect reveals the truth about the disappearance of his one-time girlfriend.

programme.title: Interrogation Cam
programme.desc: A teen couple must answer for a father's murder; a wife tries to explain why she was caught arranging to have her husband killed; the truth about the shocking death of a pregnant woman comes to light.

programme.title: The First 48 (S26)
programme.desc: When a man is lured into a deadly trap, detectives must turn the tables on the suspects before they strike again.

programme.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans (S2)
programme.desc: Detective Maurice Stewart investigates the murder of a woman, who was allegedly gunned down by her neighbour after an argument over cats and dogs.

programme.title: Accused: Did I Do It?
programme.desc: The wife claims she has no memory of wounding him, but when the police investigate, she is charged with second-degree murder. Is she a murderous wife or a battered spouse?

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: An accused sex offender masturbates in virtual court; a defendant begs the judge to let him go home to take care of his dog; a convicted murderer tells the judge to 'hurry up' during sentencing; and more.

programme.title: Court Cam (S5)
programme.desc: A father attacks his son's killer in court; a defendant drops the f-bomb during a virtual hearing; a man convicted of child abuse lashes out at the judge; and more.

programme.title: After The First 48 (S15)
programme.desc: After a former marine is gunned down in broad daylight, Tulsa detectives must track down a family of three. But, at trial, justice hangs on whether the gunman and victim are actually who they appear to be.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent? (S5)
programme.desc: A violent argument between two men erupts at a busy grocery store. One is shot dead and the other faces a murder charge. With the whole incident caught on CCTV, who will the jury believe was the aggressor?

programme.title: Cold Case Files: Murder In The Bayou
programme.desc: The town of Alexandria, Louisiana, is rocked when the body of Courtney Coco, 19, is found dumped 200 miles from home in Winnie, Texas.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: When two teenage classmates in Northern California go missing within weeks of each other, their mothers struggle to get police to take the situation seriously.

programme.title: Witness To Murder: Digital Evidence
programme.desc: After a young woman is found dead in her bathtub, the investigation focuses in on her estranged husband and her boyfriend. An unexpected digital clue has one of them confessing to the murder.

programme.title: Cold Case Files: DNA Speaks
programme.desc: When the battered body of Shawna Yandell, 16, is found floating in Washington State's Yakima River in 1993, detectives first suspect those closest to her.

programme.title: Booked: First Day In (S2)
programme.desc: A man charged with his fourth DUI rages against the machine, and a mom, who's a first-time arrestee, contemplates life as a possible convicted felon. In Modesto, a man is accused of felony arson.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Since early childhood, living in a cluttered home is all that Destiny has ever known. In 2004 tragedy struck the family when a car accident took the lives of Destiny's sister and nephew.

programme.title: Hoarders (S15)
programme.desc: Destiny refuses to leave the house and says she "basically checked out of life". The extremely hoarded house has come to the attention of the homeowners, and they want the house cleaned up.

programme.title: Interrogation Raw (S2)
programme.desc: After a deceased baby is found hidden in a cardboard box, investigators question the mother and her estranged husband to figure out who is responsible for this horrific crime.

programme.title: Evil Up Close (S6)
programme.desc: Stephen Hough got away with raping and killing 16-year-old Janet Cummings. He fabricated an alibi for his crimes and let an innocent man go to jail. Four decades later, detectives made a breakthrough.

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Reading & Literacy
programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.title: Grade 1 Makabansa
programme.desc: Unawain ang kahalagahan ng pagkilala ng mga batayang impormasyon ng pisikal na kapaligiran sa sariling paaralan at ng mga taong bumubuo rito para sa paghubog ng kakayahan ng bawat mag-aaral.

programme.title: Grade 2 Filipino
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa pangngalan, panghalip, salitang magkatugma, salitang naglalarawan, at pagbabaybay, pati na rin ang iba't ibang elemento ng kuwento at ang pag-uugnay ng sarili sa tekstong nabasa.

programme.title: Grade 2 Math
programme.desc: Study how to divide whole numbers up to 1000 including money and unit fractions. Learn more about straight and curved lines, flat and curved surfaces, and basic shapes and continuous patterns using two attributes.

programme.title: Grade 2 English
programme.desc: Discover what are word clines, synonyms, and antonyms. Identify major points and key themes in a story, and the difference between what is made-up and real in texts.

programme.title: Grade 2 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang kahalagahan ng mabuting paglilingkod ng mga namumuno sa pagsulong ng mga pangunahing hanapbuhay at pagtugon sa pangangailangan ng mga kasapi ng sariling komunidad.

programme.title: Grade 3 Filipino
programme.desc: Pag-aralan ang tambalang salita, pandiwa, pang-abay, at pang-ukol. Alamin kung paano magbigay ng sariling ideya, hinuha, pangunahin at sumusuportang kaisipan, tungkol sa kuwentong napakinggan.

programme.title: Grade 3 Math
programme.desc: Identify which fractions are proper and improper, similar and dissimilar and equivalent. Learn more about lines and symmetrical designs, continuous and repeating patterns, and mathematical sentences involving multiplication and division of whole numbers.

programme.title: Grade 3 English
programme.desc: Study what are homonyms, homographs, and hyponyms. Know more about the elements of a story, how to write it, and how to compare and contrast its information, alongside learning about words, phrases, and sentences with long vowels.

programme.title: Grade 3 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain at pahalagahan ang pagkakakilanlang kultural ng kinabibilangang rehiyon.

programme.title: Grade 3 Science
programme.desc: Discover how objects perform motion, and learn about the source of light, sound, heat and electricity, along with their uses.

programme.title: Grade 4 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano wastong gamitin ang mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 4 Math
programme.desc: Learn about parallel and perpendicular lines, angles, triangles, quadrilaterals, continuous and repeating patterns and number sentences, and the concept of time, perimeter, area, and volume.

programme.title: Grade 4 English
programme.desc: Learn what are adverbs, signal words, and graphic organizers, and how to analyze a story and infer the speaker's tone, mood and purpose.

programme.title: Grade 4 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Unawain ang bahaging ginagampanan ng pamahalaan sa lipunan, mga pinuno at iba pang naglilingkod sa pagkakaisa, kaayusan at kaunlaran ng bansa.

programme.title: Grade 4 Science
programme.desc: Know more about forces that change the shape, size or movement of objects and how light, heat and sound travel using various media.

programme.title: Grade 10 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang iba't ibang uri ng panitikan at kung paano sulatin at suriin ang mga ito. Pag-aralan paggamit ng wastong mga pahayag at angkop na mga salita sa pagsusulat ng reaksiyon sa mga teksto at napanood na video.

programme.title: Grade 10 Math
programme.desc: Identify the key concepts of combinatorics and probability.

programme.title: Grade 10 English
programme.desc: Learn about the different techniques in writing, how to compose and critique it.

programme.title: Grade 10 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin ang mga malikhaing hakbang na nagsusulong ng pagtanggap at paggalang sa iba’t ibang kasarian upang maitaguyod ang pagkakapantay- pantay ng tao bilang kasapi ng pamayanan.

programme.title: Grade 10 Science
programme.desc: Learn about the feedback mechanisms of organisms and how it helps them maintain homeostasis. Discover how information is stored in DNA, how changes in its molecule affect its products as mutations, and how evolution through natural selection can result in biodiversity, whose influence can affect the stability of ecosystems.

programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Als
programme.desc: Learn about the process of planning, setting up, running a small business, and entrepreneurial skills.

programme.title: Grade 5 Filipino
programme.desc: Alamin ang wastong pagamit ng mga pang-abay, pang-uri, pang-angkop, pangatnig, salitang naglalarawan. Aralin kung paano magsulat ng pangungusap, talata, at balita, at kung paano magsuri ng mga kuwento at mga pahayag.

programme.title: Grade 5 Math
programme.desc: Discover what are percents, polygons, circles, solid figures, sequences, time, circumference, and how to solve simple equations.

programme.title: Grade 5 English
programme.desc: Differentiate the various text-types and know how to summarize them, as well as how to make a stand and provide evidences supporting opinions or facts.

programme.title: Grade 5 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Matuto tungkol sa mga pagbabago sa lipunan ng sinaunang Pilipino kabilang ang pagpupunyagi ng ilang pangkat na mapanatili ang kalayaan sa Kolonyalismong Espanyol at ang impluwensya nito sa kasalukuyan.

programme.title: Grade 5 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about motion in terms of distance and time, alongside how objects and people interact and are affected by light, sound, and heat, and electricity. Discover the relationship of electricity and magnetism in electromagnets, and what simple DC circuits are.

programme.title: Preschool | Eccd
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Kindergarten

programme.title: Grade 1 Language
