programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.title: C Dans L'Air
programme.desc: All the latest major events, presented, explained and analysed! Special guests and journalists in the studio analyse both the latest news but also other controversial issues to give us a better understanding of the social, political and cultural events occurring around us.

programme.title: Escapades En Suisse Italienne
programme.desc: Discover the historic centre of Giornico, with its churches and murals, in the company of historian Fabrizio Viscontini. Tasting local produce at Giorgio Lucchini's farm. Fausta Bionda and her son Enea introduce you to the spectacular sport of bouldering.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Le Goût Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Born in Harlem, of Dominican parents, JonOne grew up in a difficult context before moving to France, in 1987. Initially a street artist, he became a major contemporary artist, mixing a blend of New-Yorker and French influences, and different origins. The self-taught artist welcomes Magloire in his workshop in Roubaix.

programme.title: 6H Info
programme.desc: The 6am news bulletin (Paris time) by the France Televisions editorial team.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: Information and good humour, 7 days a week! Resolutely in tune with the times, the first morning of France, strong of its editorial richness and its team dynamics, addresses many themes and deals with current events with seriousness and without dramatization.

programme.title: Telematin
programme.desc: The latest news and laughter, 7 days a week.

programme.title: Le Goût Des Rencontres En Nouvelle-Aquitaine
programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Escapades En Suisse Italienne
programme.desc: Discover the historic centre of Giornico, with its churches and murals, in the company of historian Fabrizio Viscontini. Tasting local produce at Giorgio Lucchini's farm. Fausta Bionda and her son Enea introduce you to the spectacular sport of bouldering.

programme.title: Bestioles & Cie
programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Le Petit Geek
programme.desc: What exactly does an influencer do? How do you create a video game? Why are screens dangerous, and what about digital identities? In each episode children shed light on today's virtual world.

programme.title: Les Quiquoi
programme.desc: Olive, Petole, Boulard, Mixo, Raoul and Pamela make up a full-of-fun gang known as the Quiquoi. Together they ask a host of existential questions, using drawings to find the answers. In their own quirky way, they love nothing better than creating surrealist worlds where everything becomes possible.

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Les Croquemoutard
programme.desc: The Kiddycrunchers are a family of Trolls who have been forced to leave their home under the bridge and move into the Shoebox Housing Project to Iive amongst human beings! They discover community life and find that it isn't easy to live amongst these scrumptious creatures with their odd ways!

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region
programme.desc: Travels to discover the regions of France. Through these territories, the investigations come as close as possible to the issues of today's society.

programme.title: Ils Vecurent Heureux
programme.desc: Snow White and the Prince got married even though they don't really know each other at all...

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Vivants
programme.desc: Further to a recommendation, 30-year-old Gabrielle joins a prestigious news programme as a trainee. With no formal training, she has to find her place on a team of passionate, creative and supportive journalists who are facing fundamental changes in their profession.

programme.title: En Voiture Clara
programme.desc: Clara is 17 years old today. As part of a surprise and to create a diversion, her father, Gilles, takes her to a deserted parking lot for a driving lesson. Nothing will go as planned.

programme.title: L'Americain
programme.desc: To stave off boredom and make himself the centre of attention, Malik tells three local youngsters that he's leaving to live in the USA. It isn't true, but once the news has spread around the neighbourhood, he becomes a symbol of hope and pride for everyone.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque !
programme.desc: It's Christmas. Lea does all she can to help Myriam prepare the menu whilst Nick and Loïc have to work at the pizzeria. Pascale and Andy are delighted to see Fred arrive...

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque !
programme.desc: Loïc has met Rosalie, a neighbour living on the same landing as them and who he finds totally charming and very interesting. The interest seems to be reciprocal, but Loïc is hesitant about letting her see his disabled hand.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque !
programme.desc: Lea tries her hand at a little psychology, encouraging Nick to let his tears flow to help him get over his broken heart. Fred pretends to be ill in order to avoid going to school.

programme.title: Les Bienvenu... Ou Presque !
programme.desc: Encouraged by Andy and Loïc, Nick decides to buy a car. Myriam pays a surprise visit to the flat, hanging about and going through the children's things.

programme.title: Rassemblance
programme.desc: Born in Harlem, of Dominican parents, JonOne grew up in a difficult context before moving to France, in 1987. Initially a street artist, he became a major contemporary artist, mixing a blend of New-Yorker and French influences, and different origins. The self-taught artist welcomes Magloire in his workshop in Roubaix.

programme.title: Le Roman D'Un Jeune Homme Pauvre
programme.desc: Maxime, a young ruined marquis, takes a job under a false name as steward for a wealthy landowner. He falls madly in love with the latter's daughter, Marguerite. The young woman shares Maxime's feelings but believes she is loved mainly for her fortune.

programme.title: Au Revoir Jerome !
programme.desc: Newly arrived in heaven, Jerôme sets off in search of his wife. He gradually finds himself falling ever-deeper into a colourful but totally surrealist world where no-one seems able to help him.

programme.title: Les Belles Cicatrices
programme.desc: Gaspard is still in love with Leïla. One month after she left him, they meet again in a crowded bar. As the reunion goes badly, Gaspard hides under the table.

programme.title: 64' Actu
programme.desc: TV5MONDE's major daily news programme, decrypting the news! What you need to know: the Francophone view of the day's main events. programme.title: Rose Parade 2026
programme.desc: The Rose Parade is a celebration held in California, US. It is more than a century old a festival of flowers, music and sports unequaled anywhere else in the world. It's America's New Year Celebration, a greeting to the world on the first day of the year, and a salute to the community spirit and love of pageantry that have thrived in Pasadena for more than 100 years.

programme.desc: Chae Lian's exhaustion reaches tipping point, and her three children must band together to support her. Will the misunderstanding between mother and son be finally dissolved? Marcus attempts to right the wrongs of his company, going against his business partners to ensure justice. Marcus' decision to right the wrongs and fight for justice leaves him with a lot to lose, but will he hold on to the virtue of having done the right thing?

programme.title: FBI: International S4 - EP 14
programme.desc: Agents of the FBI's International Divison are tasked with neutralising potential threats and protecting American citizens.

programme.title: I Did It My Way 潜行
programme.desc: Four tons of drugs secretly arrived in Hong Kong and disappeared. The man behind the scenes was actually the seemingly harmless lawyer George Lam. With the help of live streaming drug trafficking on the dark web, his close friend and beloved wife encountered changes one after another. Reaching a dead end, Lam went completely crazy and wanted to make the whole world pay the price.

programme.title: A Simple Life 桃姐
programme.desc: Inspired by a true story, the film tells about a heartwarming relationship between a young master of a big family, Roger, and the servant of the family who raised him, Sister Peach

programme.desc: In this season of Kampung Foodsteps, Darren will travel to Penang, Klang, Pantai Remis, and Cameron Highlands with guests. While enjoying this festive season, also practice the "Clean Plate" campaign.

programme.title: Camping Around The World - EP 3 在世界的角落扎营
programme.desc: Local celebrities Qi Yuwu and Joanne Peh enjoyed their first outdoor camping experience on Ja-eundo Island in Jeollanam-do, South Korea, reliving romantic moments while biking, horseback riding, and exploring mudflats to catch octopus, dig for clams, and experience salt farming.

programme.title: LNX x Hawkers - EP 3 星 料理
programme.desc: LNX collaborates with the owner of a Hor Fun Store and creates a new dish which fuses squid ink with Hor Fun, whilst bearing in mind the theme of the episode -- "Black and White". This fusion extracts the essence of each dish, and creatively creates an entirely new dish from scratch which taps on the unique flavours of both the squid ink and hor fun.

programme.title: Golden Age Talentime 2026 S1 - EP 7 黄金年华之斗歌竞艺
programme.desc: After decades devoted to careers and family, these senior contestants enter a new chapter of life. Golden Age Talentime follows their journey as they rediscover long-held music dreams. The brand-new series will continue the team battle concept, creating a platform with greater diversity and excitement for the seniors to have an equal chance to stay till the end.

programme.title: News Tonight 晚间新闻
programme.desc: Daily evening updates on top local news and world news.

programme.title: Healing Heroes - EP 83 医生不是神
programme.desc: Yige suspects that her father is having an affair with the maid. She tells Yishi who is away in America about how Misan is pregnant and may be forced to have an abortion. Her conversation is overheard by Gavin. Yige calls home but nobody picks up, and Gavin jokes that the incident may blow up into a murder case. Yige is worried and tells Gavin to take her shift so she can go home to check.

programme.title: World's Unique Neighbourhoods - EP 1 世界独特社区
programme.desc: Shimokitazawa is trendy yet traditional, avant garde but retro. The contradictions & extremes are rational & life here has a million of possibilities. Wan Chai, which has local & lively vibes, is tagged as a cool neighbourhood. The co-existence of old & new transcends the cyclical shifts of trends.

programme.title: Talk of the Town - EP 154 狮城热话
programme.desc: A half-hour talk-show segment in Hello Singapore which brings together diverse voices and expert opinions to thought-provoking discussions on wide range of issues. Incorporating online polls which gather public opinions, the segment creates a space that allows for multi viewpoints in the studio from Monday to Friday.

programme.title: A Wedding
programme.desc: Zahira, eighteen years old, a Belgian-Pakistani girl wants to keep the baby growing inside her. Amir, her brother and confidant, promises to help her. But the parents have other ideas for the young girl.

programme.title: Masha
programme.desc: Masha has grown up between the boxing ring and the streets of her provincial Russian town. Her closest friends, young gangsters who are loathed by the entire town, love and protect her. And suddenly the cruel truth about them is revealed to her.

programme.title: Run Woman Run
programme.desc: When a steady diet of donuts, pizza, cake and cigarettes lands Beck in a diabetic coma, she receives a ghostly life coach in the form of legendary marathon hero Tom Longboat who helps her train for the run of her life.

programme.title: Summer Rebels
programme.desc: Young Jonas wants to visit his cool grandpa in Slovakia for a summer of fun, but his mom has other plans. Undeterred, Jonas takes off on an adventure of his own in this luminous and light-hearted tale of rebellion, friendship, catastrophe and redemption.

programme.title: Six Points About Emma
programme.desc: Blind and almost thirty, Emma is desperate to become a mother. She breaks up with her infertile boyfriend and sets out to find the perfect sperm donor without love or emotion, but soon discovers that it is not just her eyes which are blind.

programme.title: One Floor Below
programme.desc: After being the sole unfortunate witness to a domestic quarrel that ends up in a murder, Patrascu finds himself at odds with two very close neighbours: one is the bizarre murderer. The other is his very own conscience.

programme.title: I Want You
programme.desc: In this achingly melancholic sequel to Three Meters Above the Sky, Mario Casas is the soulful Hache, a man trying to forget his first love, Babi. When he meets Gin, he thinks he might love again. But a chance encounter with Babi shatters it all.

programme.title: Milk Teeth
programme.desc: Living in a small rural community, Skalde navigates societal stigma due to having an “outsider” mother. When she befriends a mysterious girl in the woods, Skalde jeopardizes everything, struggling to balance loyalty to her community and her newfound bond.

programme.title: A Wedding
programme.desc: Zahira, eighteen years old, a Belgian-Pakistani girl wants to keep the baby growing inside her. Amir, her brother and confidant, promises to help her. But the parents have other ideas for the young girl.

programme.title: Ann
programme.desc: The real-life story of Ann Lovett, a 15-year-old Irish girl who died in childbirth in a grotto of her local church in 1984. The film revisits a tragedy that shook the nation to its core.

programme.title: Romancing The Jungle
programme.desc: Eva is a rookie journalist keen on investigating sea piracy. When she is really kidnapped by pirates in Thailand, she is forced to fight for her life. With her is a hunky smuggler called Nik, and together, the comedic duo band together to survive.

programme.title: The Pont D'Arc Murders
programme.desc: Two investigators with a painfully linked past are forced to team up to solve a mysterious murder which involves a carved stone dating back more than 40,000 years. They soon discover that the very thing that connects them might just solve the case.

programme.title: Sleepless Night
programme.desc: A cop with a connection to the criminal underworld finds his secret life exposed when he and his partner are caught stealing cocaine from a powerful drug dealer, a move that puts his son's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Not My Type
programme.desc: A dashing philosopher is sent off to teach in a quiet northern town, where he soon falls for a bubbly and rather vulgar local hairdresser. But will the couple’s carnal affection manage to overcome their irreconcilable differences?

programme.title: Winners
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mona, a Syrian refugee in Berlin, struggles to adapt to her new life. When she joins a competitive girls' football team, she faces the challenge of being an outsider. Soon she realizes the value of teamwork for success.

programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight & Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?

programme.title: Alex Baker's Biggest 00s Anthems! - EP1
programme.desc: Alex Baker brings you his 50 biggest 00s anthems! Expect everything from Green Day to Muse, Linkin Park to the Arctic Monkeys with the tunes getting bigger and louder as we go!

programme.title: 50 Rock Heroes of the 00s! - EP1
programme.desc: Claire Sturgess relives her 50 greatest heroes with the rock music that defined the 00s! Blink, MCR, Razorlight & Kings of Leon are all in the top 10 - but who's at number 1?

programme.title: No Intro Needed: 50 Rock Classics - EP1
programme.desc: 50 legendary rock tracks you absolutely know - but how fast can you name them? One thing's for sure: after the first riff, they'll be stuck in your head all night long!

programme.title: One Floor Below
programme.desc: After being the sole unfortunate witness to a domestic quarrel that ends up in a murder, Patrascu finds himself at odds with two very close neighbours: one is the bizarre murderer. The other is his very own conscience.

programme.title: Milk Teeth
programme.desc: Living in a small rural community, Skalde navigates societal stigma due to having an “outsider” mother. When she befriends a mysterious girl in the woods, Skalde jeopardizes everything, struggling to balance loyalty to her community and her newfound bond.

programme.title: Ann
programme.desc: The real-life story of Ann Lovett, a 15-year-old Irish girl who died in childbirth in a grotto of her local church in 1984. The film revisits a tragedy that shook the nation to its core.

programme.title: The Pont D'Arc Murders
programme.desc: Two investigators with a painfully linked past are forced to team up to solve a mysterious murder which involves a carved stone dating back more than 40,000 years. They soon discover that the very thing that connects them might just solve the case.

programme.title: Deal At The Border
programme.desc: Aza and Samat, two drug runners navigating the secret routes in the mountains of Central Asia, stumble upon Nazik, a young girl fleeing from slavery. When Nazik is recaptured by a criminal, facing a grim return to captivity, Aza resolves to save her.

programme.title: Sleepless Night
programme.desc: A cop with a connection to the criminal underworld finds his secret life exposed when he and his partner are caught stealing cocaine from a powerful drug dealer, a move that puts his son's life in jeopardy.

programme.title: Diana's Wedding
programme.desc: Through the eyes of Diana, we witness the rollercoaster ride of both her parent’s and Irene’s marriages. To both girls, they have the worst parents in the world. But at the end of the day, which of the couples remain strong and which fall apart ?

programme.title: Not My Type
programme.desc: A dashing philosopher is sent off to teach in a quiet northern town, where he soon falls for a bubbly and rather vulgar local hairdresser. But will the couple’s carnal affection manage to overcome their irreconcilable differences?

programme.title: Bad Investigate
programme.desc: A corrupt cop sets out to hunt down a dangerous drug dealer who is seeking revenge for the death of his brother. Also trying to catch the same criminal is an FBI agent.

programme.title: Winners
programme.desc: 11-year-old Mona, a Syrian refugee in Berlin, struggles to adapt to her new life. When she joins a competitive girls' football team, she faces the challenge of being an outsider. Soon she realizes the value of teamwork for success.

programme.title: Murder in Charente
programme.desc: When 38-year-old Cyril is found murdered on the grounds of a grand estate, pregnant detective Maud Arthuis teams up with private investigator Lucien Labeguerri. As secrets unravel and another murder occurs, the case becomes deeply personal for them both.

programme.title: Hard Shell, Soft Shell
programme.desc: Loved-up oyster farmer Az thinks he’s made it. But when an elaborate proposal goes awry and his girlfriend Jess breaks his heart, Az is forced to confront his understanding of what happiness really looks like – both hers and his own.

programme.title: Black As The Snow
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the rampage in the ski resort of Morzine-Avoriaz. Vivier, French police officer teams up with the Swiss policeman Meyer to investigate the suspicious deaths of teenagers. They must find the killer before the victim list grows.

programme.title: The Hunt
programme.desc: After the death of their father and mother, four siblings reunite to come to terms with the tragedy. They decide to participate in a hunting challenge which will determine their inheritance.
